title: Abyssopelagic | End Music Expansion
description: Abyssopelagic is a resource pack that adds my 4 fanmade End tracks to minecraft!
body:
# A new vibe for the end
This resource pack adds 3 new soundtracks produced by me to give a more distant, alien feel to the end. C418's track does already do this very well, however we do need some more music in The End. 
## LISTEN TO THE WHOLE TRACK LIST HERE :)))
